message:
fix(command,store): fix XGROUP/XINFO test assertions, correct INCRBYFLOAT infinity

- Update 8 XGROUP/XINFO test assertions from WrongArity to
  WrongSubcommandArity to match handler behavior after concurrent refactor
- Fix INCRBYFLOAT/HINCRBYFLOAT: remove is_infinite() check — Redis allows
  storing infinity via INCRBYFLOAT (only NaN is rejected). Keep
  is_infinite() for ZINCRBY since sorted set scores must be finite.
- Fixes incrbyfloat_preserves_infinity_until_nan_transition test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
